name: West Hudson Teachers
description_short: West Hudson Teachers Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving educators and their families in North Arlington, NJ with traditional credit union services.
description_long: West Hudson Teachers Federal Credit Union (WHTFCU) is a federal credit union operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) oversight rather than FDIC regulation, which distinguishes it from traditional for-profit banks. The institution maintains a physical branch location with staff available during business hours to assist members with their financial needs. As a teacher-focused credit union, WHTFCU distinguishes itself through its mission-driven approach to serving educators and their families rather than maximizing shareholder profits. Credit unions in this category traditionally offer competitive rates on savings and loans, lower fees than commercial banks, and personalized service tailored to their membership base. The organization's longevity and continued operation suggests stable, established operations within the educator community. Prospective members should note that this profile is limited by available public information. To make an informed decision, interested consumers should contact the institution directly at the provided phone number to learn about current rates, membership eligibility requirements, specific loan products, and fee structures. The physical location provides opportunity for in-person consultation with knowledgeable staff who can address detailed financial questions.
